nasb.text: and the priest shall go out to the outside of the camp. Thus the priest shall look, and if the infection of leprosy has been healed in the leper,

esv.text: and the priest shall go out of the camp, and the priest shall look. Then, if the case of leprous disease is healed in the leprous person,

cnv.text: 祭司要出到營外去察看，祭司若是看見患病的人身上的痲風病已經好了，

ccb.text: 祭司要到营外去检查，如果发现他的病已痊愈，
